title: Project Report: CodeQuest Marking Workflow Analysis — Business Analyst
author: Gagan Pasupuleti
summary: Map current vs future state with BPMN, define requirements for teacher marking feature, write UAT plan.
source_file: CodeQuest project specification (official docs + industry patterns)

chapters.title: Project Overview
chapters.content:
**Chapter focus: Project Overview** *(Level: Intermediate)*

**CodeQuest Marking Workflow Analysis** is a intermediate-level end-to-end project for Business Analyst. Duration: 3 weeks. Map current vs future state with BPMN, define requirements for teacher marking feature, write UAT plan. Tools: Bizagi/draw.io, Confluence.

Code Reference:
```text
Objective: As-is and to-be BPMN diagrams
Objective: 15 functional requirements
Objective: UAT test plan with 10 cases
Objective: Stakeholder sign-off template
```
What it shows: Lists measurable outcomes before you start building.

### What it actually is
A project overview defines scope, tools, and success criteria.

### When to use it
At project kickoff.

### Where to use it
Business Analyst portfolios and CodeQuest project submissions.

### Real use example
A candidate lists this project on a Business Analyst resume with a demo link.
key_takeaways: A project overview defines scope, tools, and success criteria.
A candidate lists this project on a Business Analyst resume with a demo link.

chapters.title: Final Deliverables and Review
chapters.content:
**Chapter focus: Final Deliverables and Review** *(Level: Intermediate)*

Submit all final deliverables: BPMN diagrams; Requirements spec; UAT plan. Skills demonstrated: BPMN, Requirements, UAT. Prepare a 5-minute walkthrough video and README for CodeQuest teacher marking.

Code Reference:
```text
Deliverable: BPMN diagrams
Deliverable: Requirements spec
Deliverable: UAT plan
```
What it shows: Final checklist ensures nothing is missing at submission.

### What it actually is
Deliverable review confirms end-to-end project completion.

### When to use it
Before deadline and teacher review.

### Where to use it
CodeQuest project gallery and interviews.

### Real use example
A student submits BPMN diagrams and passes the rubric.
